D:\Language\c++\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc libbeas_audio.a CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/beas_audio.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/phsm/phsm.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/pci/pci.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/poe/poe.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/masking/masking.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/dsp/simd.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/dsp/eq.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/dsp/hrtf.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/dsp/ambient.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/dsp/postprocess.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/dsp/sanitize.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/dsp/fft.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/util/cpu.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/beas_audio.dir/src/util/flush.cpp.obj
D:\Language\c++\ucrt64\bin\ranlib.exe libbeas_audio.a
